# Causal Checklist for INC-42

## Status & Ownership
- **Incident**: INC-42 (Active)
- **Owner**: Database SRE
- **Acceptor**: Incident Commander

## Metrics & Actions
- **Metric**: Replication lag
- **Current Value**: 47 s
- **Limit/Threshold**: 10 s
- **Time Window**: 3 minutes
- **Action**: Freeze writes (congelar escrituras) since replication lag (47 s) exceeds the 10 s limit for 3 minutes.

## Handoff & Dependencies
- **Failover target**: replica-eu-2
- **Pre-condition**: Failover to replica-eu-2 can only occur after the checksum matches (checksum coincida).

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Replication lag < 10 s
- [ ] Checksum matches (checksum coincida)
